ticket:
Hello,

My name is Emily Johnson.
Email: emily.johnson@email.com

Order 88771 stopped working after three months.

I would like to claim my warranty.

plan.reason: customer is claiming warranty for a non-functioning order

classification.reason: Customer is reporting a product malfunction within the warranty period

email.subject: Re: Warranty Claim for Order 88771
email.body: Dear Emily Johnson, thank you for reaching out. I've checked on the status of your order 88771, which was delivered. I'm happy to assist you with your warranty claim. Please allow me to review this further.
